gist.headline: The right key for the right door
gist.blurb: We fixed a bug where valid API keys were getting rejected when trying to upload media. The play page is back to accepting your images with open arms!
gist.summary: Updated the media worker to use the correct API key validation route, resolving an issue where valid keys were incorrectly rejected.
gist.impact: Users can once again successfully upload images and media on the play page without encountering false authentication errors.
gist.visual_concept: The bee (Polly) holding a shiny golden key, unlocking a glowing media folder or picture frame. The Nomnom creature happily eating the old, broken lock.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a shiny golden key to unlock a glowing picture frame. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a broken rusty padlock nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
